Skip to contents
tempssm 0.3.0
  • Reference
    • tempssm: State-space modeling for temperature time series in R
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

AIC(<tempssm>)
AIC method for tempssm objects (S3 method)
autoplot(<tempssm>)
Autoplot method for tempssm objects
autoplot_ar1()
Plot the estimated autoregressive component from a tempssm model
autoplot_drift()
Plot the estimated drift (slope) component from a tempssm model
autoplot_level()
Plot the estimated level component from a tempssm model
autoplot_season()
Plot the estimated seasonal component from a tempssm model
compare_ts_cv()
Compare time-series cross-validation results across models
compute_cv_metrics()
Compute forecast accuracy metrics for a CV fold
compute_monthly_climatology()
Compute seasonal climatology (mean seasonal cycle)
compute_temp_anomaly()
Compute seasonal temperature anomalies
convert_monthly_df_to_ts()
Convert a data frame of monthly temperature time series to a ts object
daily_zoo_to_monthly_ts()
Convert a daily zoo object to a monthly ts object
diagnose_residuals()
Residual diagnostics for tempssm models
fuji_temp
Monthly mean air temperature at the summit of Mt. Fuji
get_ar1_ts()
Extract the first autoregressive component (AR1) as a time series
get_drift_ts()
Extract the drift (slope) component as a time series
get_exo_coef()
Extract coefficients of exogenous variables with confidence intervals
get_jma_sst_ts()
Retrieve daily mean sea-surface temperature as a monthly ts object from JMA
get_jma_sst_zoo()
Retrieve daily mean sea-surface temperature as a zoo object from JMA
get_level_ts()
Extract the level component as a time series
get_season_ts()
Extract the seasonal component as a time series
get_tempssm_params()
Extract estimated parameters in the fitted models
get_tempssm_residuals()
Extract standardized recursive residuals
hmo_temp
Monthly mean air temperature at Hohenpeissenberg Meteorological Observatory
logLik(<tempssm>)
Log-likelihood method for tempssm objects (S3 method)
nao
North Atlantic Oscillation: NAO (Hurrell)
niigata_sst
Monthly mean sea surface temperature off Niigata, Japan
pdo
Pacific Decadal Oscillation (PDO) index (JMA)
plot(<tempssm>)
Plot method for tempssm objects
plot_temp_dev()
Plot temperature anomalies
plot_tempssm_residual_diagnostics()
Plot residual diagnostics for tempssm models
predict(<tempssm>)
Forecast from a fitted tempssm model
print(<summary.tempssm>)
Print method for summary of tempssm objects
print(<tempssm>)
Print method for tempssm objects
read_monthly_temp_ts()
Read and convert a monthly temperature CSV file to a ts object
set_ts_name()
Assign variable names to a ts object
soi
Southern Oscillation Index (SOI)
split_multi_ts()
Split a multivariate ts object into univariate ts objects
summary(<tempssm>)
Summary method for tempssm objects
tempssm()
tempssm: State space models for temperature time series
trim_prediction_intervals()
Trim forecast intervals by maximum interval width
trim_ts_overlap()
Trim and align temperature and exogenous time series over their shared period
ts_cv_collect()
Collect time series cross-validation results into a tibble
ts_cv_run()
Run time series cross-validation over multiple folds
ts_cv_run_fold()
Run time series cross-validation for a single fold
ts_train_test_split()
Generate rolling train/test splits for time series
yamaguchi_sst
Montly mean temperature time series off Yamaguchi Prefecture

Developed by Akira S. Hirao, Shinya Baba, Momoko Ichinokawa.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
